title: veronica macrantha var. brachyphylla
intro: Veronica macrantha var. brachyphylla, also known as the short-leaved speedwell, is a plant species in the family Plantaginaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate congestion, and soothe sore throats, making it a popular remedy in herbal medicine. Veronica macrantha var. brachyphylla can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or syrup, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for its medicinal benefits.
